mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_claim ( claim_code, c_code, id, f_code, claim_type, claim_status, claim_reason, claim_createddate ) VALUES ( #{claim_code}, #{c_code}, #{id}, #{f_code}, #{claim_type}, 0, #{claim_reason}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT claim_code, c_code, id, f_code, claim_type, claim_status, claim_reason, claim_createddate FROM order_claim WHERE c_code = #{c_code} AND id = #{id}

SELECT oc.claim_code, oc.c_code, oc.id, oc.f_code, oc.claim_type, oc.claim_status, oc.claim_reason, oc.claim_createddate, f.f_name FROM order_claim oc JOIN furniture f ON oc.f_code = f.f_code WHERE oc.id = #{id} ORDER BY oc.claim_createddate DESC

SELECT oc.claim_code, oc.c_code, oc.id, oc.f_code, oc.claim_type, oc.claim_status, oc.claim_reason, oc.claim_createddate, f.f_name FROM order_claim oc JOIN furniture f ON oc.f_code = f.f_code ORDER BY oc.claim_createddate DESC

SELECT oc.claim_code, oc.c_code, oc.id, oc.f_code, oc.claim_type, oc.claim_status, oc.claim_reason, oc.claim_createddate, f.f_name, f.c_id, f.c_name FROM order_claim oc JOIN furniture f ON oc.f_code = f.f_code WHERE f.c_id = #{company_id} ORDER BY oc.claim_createddate DESC
SELECT claim_code, c_code, id, f_code, claim_type, claim_status, claim_reason, claim_createddate FROM order_claim WHERE claim_code = #{claim_code}
